provider.name: ornith
provider.reason: Full Ornith 1.0 397B is not practical on the current 64 GB Apple Silicon Mac; Ornith 1.0 35B Q4_K_M GGUF is validated as the local coding candidate.
provider.embedding_policy: Use a separate fit-for-purpose embedding model; Ornith is not promoted as an embedding model.

feasibility.reason: Weight files alone exceed unified memory by a wide margin before KV cache, runtime overhead, process memory, or OS pressure. Storage is available, but memory and practical throughput are not.
feasibility.decision: Do not download full 397B weights locally. Do not rewire production tools to Ornith until a validated endpoint exists.

approved_runtime_policy.tier_3_local_fallback: use Ornith 1.0 35B Q4_K_M GGUF on llama.cpp for preferred local coding when explicitly started and swap pressure allows it, with current oMLX/Gemma as stable fallback
remote_requirements: prefix or prompt caching when available

active_local_fallback.provider: Ornith 35B GGUF on-demand local coding lane

blocked_actions.blocker: unsafe storage and memory impact without viable local runtime

blocked_actions.action: create paid GPU instance or remote endpoint
blocked_actions.blocker: material cost and credentials require explicit approval

blocked_actions.action: make full Ornith 397B default in Codex/OpenCode/Hermes/Goose/OpenClaw

validation_gates_before_activation: authenticated /v1/models returns exact Ornith model id or served alias
reasoning_content is separated from final content
reported model identity does not silently fall back to another model
latency and memory are within the documented operating envelope
fallback to the current oMLX Gemma provider succeeds
